title: Zelda 2 - Temple Theme on Mario Paint Composer
description:
The normal Temple theme from the Second Legend of Zelda game for the NES. One of the quickest and simplest so far, yet still very good. I was surprised at the good quality of the music in this game, because it wasn't composed by Koji Kondo (who normally does the Mario and Zelda games). Everything about this game was different, yet it still is a very fun game.
This song is also in Super Smash Brothers Melee and Brawl.
Requested by UltimateLuigi95. Thanks :)

Software used:
Music: Mario Paint Composer - http://www.unfungames.com/mariopaint/

Notation: MidiNotate Player - http://www.notation.com/MidiNotatePlayer.htm

Video: FreezScreen Video Capture - (not recommended)

All free, legal, and unlimited.
